description: You are a materials scientist characterizing an Au-Pb-Sn solder alloy. Your goal is to measure the local thickness distribution of both the primary (bright) and matrix (dark) phases for the image at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/metallography/AuPbSn40_alloy.tif using the Local Thickness method. Generate thickness maps for the solid phase (solid_phase_thickness_map.tif) and the void/matrix phase (void_phase_thickness_map.tif). Record the mean, standard deviation, and maximum thickness for both phases in ~/Fiji_Data/results/thickness/thickness_statistics.csv using the columns: phase, mean_thickness_px, std_thickness_px, max_thickness_px. Finally, save a color-coded visualization of a thickness map as thickness_visualization.png and a histogram of the solid phase thickness as thickness_histogram.png in the results directory.
